All International students are required to register on the study in India portal: www.studyinindia.gov.in

Sandip University is a top private university in India, located in Nashik, Maharashtra.

The University is set in a picturesque lush green Wi-Fi enabled campus spanning across 250+ acres

Sandip University provides 100% Placement Assistance
Is Sandip University UGC-approved?
Yes, Sandip University is a UGC-approved University in India

The fees structure is available on our website, and we encourage you to check it out.
Are there any scholarships or financial aids available for students?
We offer various scholarships and financial aids to deserving students; please visit our website for more information.
What are the payment methods accepted by Sandip University?
We accept all major credit cards, online transfers, and cash payments at our campus.
What are the fees for on-campus accommodation?
Fees vary depending on the type of room and amenities.

No, all facilities are included in the tuition fee.

No, these services are also included in the tuition fee.
What are the tuition fees for international students?
The tuition fees for international students vary depending on the program and institution.
How do I pay my fees as an international student?
International students can pay their fees through various methods, including bank transfer or credit card.
Are there any scholarships available to help with fees?
Yes, the university offers a range of scholarships to help international students cover their tuition fees.
What are the additional costs I should expect when paying fees?
In addition to tuition fees, international students should also budget for living expenses, health insurance, and other miscellaneous costs.
How do I pay my university fees?
University fees can be paid online, by bank transfer or through various other payment methods.
Are there any discounts available for university fees?
Discounts may be available for students who meet certain criteria, such as being an international student.
Can I defer my university fee payment?
Payment deferrals are usually only possible in exceptional circumstances and with prior approval from the university.
What happens if I fail to pay my university fees?
Failure to pay university fees can result in penalties, fines or even suspension from studies.
What are the fees associated with SU-JEE?
The fees for SU-JEE vary depending on the stream and category, please check the official website for more details.
Can I reappear for an examination if I don't perform well?
Yes, students can reappear for the same exam at the next available date in case of unforeseen circumstances or to better their score.
